sections.content: The SPACE actions stopped early after 8 actions due to "noop_short_circuit". This means the bars reached their maximum and further SPACE actions are no-ops. Let me check the bar state.

<function=python>

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
